# Profit Media — פרסום דיגיטלי בישראל

> https://profitmedia.co.il

Profit Media is a digital marketing agency in Israel specializing in Facebook, Instagram, and Google ads, landing pages, and lead generation.

## Services
- Paid social and search campaign management
- A/B testing and conversion optimization
- Interactive lead forms and questionnaires
- High-converting landing pages

## Contact
- Website: https://profitmedia.co.il/#contact
- Accessibility statement: https://profitmedia.co.il/hatzara

## Key pages
- Home: https://profitmedia.co.il/
- Privacy: https://profitmedia.co.il/prat
